topic: Metal reactivity — average reaction time bar chart

render_data.title: Average time to produce 50 cm³ of gas vs coin composition
render_data.metric: Average time to produce 50 cm³ of gas / s
render_data.reaction: metal + phosphoric acid → metal phosphate + hydrogen
render_data.task: More copper → slower reaction (longer time). Cross-reference each coin's reaction time with this composition chart, then with the year–composition table.
render_data.answer: Coin 1 (≈ 120 s) → 1793–1849 (100% Cu, slowest). Coin 2 (≈ 70 s) → 1865–1943 (95% Cu, medium). Coin 3 (≈ 35 s) → 1982–present (97.5% Zn, fastest).
